# @zilliz/milvus2-sdk-node

> Node.js SDK for Milvus vector database. Use it for semantic search, RAG retrieval, recommendation systems, and any application that needs vector similarity search with metadata filtering.

## Install

```bash
npm install @zilliz/milvus2-sdk-node
```

## Key Constraints

- Call `loadCollection` after `createCollection` — collections must be loaded into memory before search/query.
- Vector dimensions must be consistent: the dimension at insert and search must match the collection schema.
- VarChar fields require `max_length`. Array fields require `element_type` and `max_capacity`.
- `search` returns results sorted by similarity score. `query` returns rows matching a scalar filter (no vector needed).
- Int64 values beyond Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER (2^53) should be passed as strings.
- For serverless/edge environments (Cloudflare Workers, Vercel Edge), use `HttpClient` instead of `MilvusClient` — gRPC is not available there.

## Task: Basic Vector Search (RAG Retrieval)

```typescript
import { MilvusClient, DataType, MetricType } from '@zilliz/milvus2-sdk-node';

const client = new MilvusClient({ address: 'localhost:19530' });

// 1. Create collection with schema
await client.createCollection({
  collection_name: 'documents',
  fields: [
    { name: 'id', data_type: DataType.Int64, is_primary_key: true, autoID: true },
    { name: 'vector', data_type: DataType.FloatVector, dim: 1536 }, // match your embedding model
    { name: 'text', data_type: DataType.VarChar, max_length: 4000 },
    { name: 'source', data_type: DataType.VarChar, max_length: 256 },
  ],
  index_params: [
    {
      field_name: 'vector',
      index_type: 'HNSW',
      metric_type: MetricType.COSINE,
      params: { M: 16, efConstruction: 256 },
    },
  ],
});

// 2. Load into memory (required before search/query)
await client.loadCollection({ collection_name: 'documents' });

// 3. Insert documents with embeddings
await client.insert({
  collection_name: 'documents',
  data: [
    { vector: embedding1, text: 'document content...', source: 'file1.pdf' },
    { vector: embedding2, text: 'another document...', source: 'file2.pdf' },
  ],
});

// 4. Retrieve top-K similar documents
const { results } = await client.search({
  collection_name: 'documents',
  data: [queryEmbedding],
  limit: 5,
  output_fields: ['text', 'source'],
});
// results: [{ id, score, text, source }, ...]
```

## Task: Hybrid Search (Vector + Metadata Filter)

```typescript
const { results } = await client.search({
  collection_name: 'products',
  data: [queryVector],
  limit: 20,
  filter: 'category == "electronics" AND price < 500 AND brand IN ["Apple", "Samsung"]',
  output_fields: ['name', 'price', 'category', 'brand'],
});
```

Filter expression syntax:
- Comparison: `==`, `!=`, `>`, `<`, `>=`, `<=`
- Logical: `AND`, `OR`, `NOT`
- Set: `IN [val1, val2]`
- String: `LIKE "prefix%"`
- Array: `ARRAY_CONTAINS(field, value)`, `ARRAY_LENGTH(field) > N`
- JSON: `json_field["key"] == "value"`

## Task: Collection with Rich Schema (Array, JSON, multiple fields)

```typescript
import { MilvusClient, DataType, MetricType } from '@zilliz/milvus2-sdk-node';

const client = new MilvusClient({ address: 'localhost:19530' });

await client.createCollection({
  collection_name: 'articles',
  fields: [
    { name: 'id', data_type: DataType.Int64, is_primary_key: true, autoID: true },
    { name: 'title', data_type: DataType.VarChar, max_length: 512 },
    { name: 'embedding', data_type: DataType.FloatVector, dim: 768 },
    { name: 'tags', data_type: DataType.Array, element_type: DataType.VarChar, max_length: 64, max_capacity: 20 },
    { name: 'metadata', data_type: DataType.JSON },
  ],
  index_params: [
    {
      field_name: 'embedding',
      index_type: 'HNSW',
      metric_type: MetricType.COSINE,
      params: { M: 16, efConstruction: 256 },
    },
  ],
});

await client.loadCollection({ collection_name: 'articles' });
```

## Task: Multi-Tenant with Partition Key

Automatically routes data/queries by tenant without manual partition management.

```typescript
await client.createCollection({
  collection_name: 'tenant_data',
  fields: [
    { name: 'id', data_type: DataType.Int64, is_primary_key: true, autoID: true },
    { name: 'tenant_id', data_type: DataType.VarChar, max_length: 64, is_partition_key: true },
    { name: 'vector', data_type: DataType.FloatVector, dim: 128 },
    { name: 'content', data_type: DataType.VarChar, max_length: 2000 },
  ],
  num_partitions: 16,
});

await client.loadCollection({ collection_name: 'tenant_data' });

// Insert — Milvus routes to correct partition automatically
await client.insert({
  collection_name: 'tenant_data',
  data: [{ tenant_id: 'user_123', vector: [...], content: 'hello' }],
});

// Search scoped to one tenant (fast — only reads that partition)
const { results } = await client.search({
  collection_name: 'tenant_data',
  data: [queryVector],
  filter: 'tenant_id == "user_123"',
  limit: 10,
  output_fields: ['content'],
});
```

## Task: Sparse Vector / Full-Text Search

```typescript
await client.createCollection({
  collection_name: 'text_search',
  fields: [
    { name: 'id', data_type: DataType.Int64, is_primary_key: true, autoID: true },
    { name: 'sparse', data_type: DataType.SparseFloatVector },
    { name: 'text', data_type: DataType.VarChar, max_length: 5000 },
  ],
});

// Sparse vectors as { dimension_index: weight } dictionaries
await client.insert({
  collection_name: 'text_search',
  data: [
    { sparse: { 0: 0.5, 10: 0.3, 200: 0.8 }, text: 'machine learning...' },
    { sparse: { 1: 0.1, 50: 0.9 }, text: 'database systems...' },
  ],
});
```

## Task: Iterate Over Large Result Sets

```typescript
// Query iterator — paginate through all matching rows
const queryIter = await client.queryIterator({
  collection_name: 'documents',
  filter: 'status == "active"',
  batchSize: 1000,
  limit: 100000,
  output_fields: ['text', 'source'],
});

for await (const batch of queryIter) {
  processBatch(batch); // batch: Record<string, any>[]
}

// Search iterator — paginated vector search
const searchIter = await client.searchIterator({
  collection_name: 'documents',
  data: queryVector,
  batchSize: 100,
  limit: 5000,
  output_fields: ['text'],
});

for await (const batch of searchIter) {
  processBatch(batch);
}
```

## Task: Bulk Data Import

Generate Milvus-compatible files locally, then import server-side.

```typescript
import { BulkWriter, DataType } from '@zilliz/milvus2-sdk-node';

const writer = new BulkWriter({
  schema: {
    fields: [
      { name: 'id', data_type: DataType.Int64, is_primary_key: true },
      { name: 'vector', data_type: DataType.FloatVector, dim: 128 },
    ],
  },
  format: 'parquet', // or 'json'
  localPath: './bulk_data',
});

for (const row of largeDataset) {
  await writer.append(row);
}
const batchFiles = await writer.close();

// Import files server-side (files must be accessible by Milvus)
await client.bulkInsert({ collection_name: 'my_collection', files: ['data.parquet'] });
await client.getImportState({ taskId });
```

## Task: Connect to Zilliz Cloud

```typescript
const client = new MilvusClient({
  address: 'https://your-instance.zillizcloud.com',
  token: 'your-api-key',
});
await client.connectPromise;
```

## Task: Use HTTP Client (Edge/Serverless)

```typescript
import { HttpClient } from '@zilliz/milvus2-sdk-node';

const client = new HttpClient({
  endpoint: 'localhost:19530',
  token: 'your-api-key', // optional
});

// Same data operations API
await client.search({ collection_name: 'docs', data: [vector], limit: 10 });
await client.query({ collection_name: 'docs', filter: 'id > 0', limit: 100 });
```

## Quick Reference: Data Types

| Use case | DataType | Notes |
|----------|----------|-------|
| Primary key | `DataType.Int64` or `DataType.VarChar` | Set `is_primary_key: true` |
| Dense embedding | `DataType.FloatVector` | Set `dim` to match model |
| Sparse embedding | `DataType.SparseFloatVector` | No dim needed |
| Text field | `DataType.VarChar` | Set `max_length` |
| Flexible metadata | `DataType.JSON` | Access via `json["key"]` in filters |
| Tags/lists | `DataType.Array` | Set `element_type` + `max_capacity` |
| Numeric | `DataType.Int32`, `Float`, `Double` | |
| Boolean | `DataType.Bool` | |

## Quick Reference: Metric Types

| Metric | Best for | Score meaning |
|--------|----------|---------------|
| `MetricType.COSINE` | Normalized embeddings (OpenAI, etc.) | Higher = more similar |
| `MetricType.L2` | Raw embeddings | Lower = more similar |
| `MetricType.IP` | Already-normalized + magnitude matters | Higher = more similar |

## Full API Reference

See [README.md](./README.md) for the complete API method signatures and parameters.
